China manufacturer for B2B baking paper buyers

Custom Cupcake liners & Paper Baking Cups Manufacturer

LANGMAI helps importers, distributors, bakery brands and supermarket buyers source custom cupcake liners, paper baking cups, air fryer liners, paper straws and party paper products with OEM/ODM support, visible certificate documents and export-ready cartons.

Explore Cake Cups Request a Quote
Founded in 200630,000+ square meters factory50+ elite team membersBSCI / ISO / FSC / FDA / LFGB / EUDR / BRC

Factory video

A closer look at LANGMAI products and export-ready presentation

Use the video to review product appearance, packaging style and factory presentation before requesting samples or a bulk quotation.

Enviar requisitos Ver productos

Export markets

From China to key overseas buying regions

LANGMAI supports importers, distributors, bakery and confectionery buyers, and large supermarkets across the Middle East, Europe, the United Kingdom, North America and South America.

Buyer trust evidence

Visible certificate previews for faster supplier screening

Instead of only listing certificate names, LANGMAI shows compliance document previews so overseas buyers can quickly assess social audit, food-contact and factory management evidence before sending an RFQ.

BSCI

amfori BSCI audit extract for social compliance screening.

BRC

BRC-related document for importer quality review.

ISO

ISO certificate preview for factory management review.

View all certificates

Product categories

Find the right product faster

Each category shows materials, common sizes, application scenarios and inquiry paths for buyers in Middle East, North America, Europe, United Kingdom, South America.

Custom Cupcake liners & Paper Baking Cups Wholesale

Food-grade greaseproof cupcake liners and paper baking cups for bakeries, importers, distributors and supermarket private-label programs.

View specs and options

Roll-Mouth Paper Baking Cups for OEM Dessert Packaging

PET-coated roll-mouth baking cups with a rigid shape, colorful finishes and OEM printing support for desserts, muffins and retail bakery displays.

View specs and options

Muffin Cup Liners for Bakeries, Cafes and Events

Tall PET-coated muffin cup liners for branded bakery displays, cafe counters, supermarkets and event dessert programs.

View specs and options

Air fryer paper liners in Bulk for Retail & Foodservice

Round and square food-grade silicone paper liners for air fryers, ovens, supermarkets and ready-to-cook food packs.

View specs and options

Biodegradable Paper straws for Wholesale Beverage Buyers

Food-grade kraft paper straws in solid, striped and seasonal designs for beverage brands, restaurants, party supply buyers and retail packs.

View specs and options

Paper Party Accessories for Retail and Event Supply

Cupcake toppers, paper doilies, cake boards, themed cups, straws, plates and disposable tableware sets for retail and event channels.

View specs and options

Factory trust

Real people, real factory, export-ready supply support

Jinhua Langmai Daily-Using Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and positions itself as a Cupcake liner manufacturer / OEM & ODM solution provider. The company profile highlights 30,000+ square meters factory capacity, 50+ elite team members, OEM/ODM customization and low-odor food-contact printing support.

  • Main markets include Middle East, North America, Europe, United Kingdom, South America.
  • Target customers include Importers, distributors, bakery and confectionery buyers, large supermarkets.
  • BSCI, ISO, FSC, FDA, LFGB, EUDR and BRC documents are listed clearly for buyer review.
View Fábrica y certificados
